MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SALVADOR GARZA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF SAID PLEADING AND DEMURRER/MOTION TO STRIKE.
